endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Subscriptions.Admin/subscriptions/{targetSubscriptionId}/acquiredPlans
endpoints.description: Get a collection of all acquired plans that subscription has access to.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{TARGETSUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real targetsubscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Subscriptions.Admin/subscriptions/{targetSubscriptionId}/acquiredPlans/{planAcquisitionId}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified plan acquired by a subscription consuming the offer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{TARGETSUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real targetsubscriptionid. Replace {{PLANACQUISITIONID}} with a real planacquisitionid.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Subscriptions.Admin/subscriptions/{targetSubscriptionId}/acquiredPlans/{planAcquisitionId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{TARGETSUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real targetsubscriptionid. Replace {{PLANACQUISITIONID}} with a real planacquisitionid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Subscriptions.Admin/subscriptions/{targetSubscriptionId}/acquiredPlans/{planAcquisitionId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{TARGETSUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real targetsubscriptionid. Replace {{PLANACQUISITIONID}} with a real planacquisitionid.
